description: Hard-surface flooring compared for wear resistance, water tolerance, comfort, and installation method.

attributes.label: Type
attributes.explanation: LVP, laminate, engineered wood, and tile have different performance profiles.

attributes.label: Wear Layer
attributes.explanation: For LVP/LVT, wear layer strongly affects scratch and dent resistance.

attributes.label: Waterproof
attributes.explanation: Bathrooms/laundry spaces need waterproof core, not just water-resistant claims.

attributes.label: Installation Method
attributes.explanation: Click-lock is generally faster; glue-down can reduce movement/noise.

attributes.label: AC Rating
attributes.explanation: Laminate AC class indicates abrasion resistance for traffic level.

watch_out_factors.title: Subfloor Flatness
watch_out_factors.description: Most failures come from poor subfloor prep, not plank quality.

watch_out_factors.title: Transition Heights
watch_out_factors.description: Door clearances and transitions can add hidden labor cost.

buyer_guide_key_points: Prioritize substrate prep and moisture testing.
Use thicker wear layers in high-traffic homes.
Account for underlayment and transition accessories in budget.
contractor_questions: What subfloor prep is required before install?
Do we need vapor barrier in this room?
How will transitions be handled at each doorway?
